description: Cross-field validation — matching case (§55.11). password "secret12" and confirm "secret12" agree → confirm eq(@signup.password) passes, confirm.isValid true, and the whole compound isValid true.
rationale: §55.11 the cross-field eq predicate passes when confirm equals the referenced password; §55.5 the rollup is true once every field (password req+length, confirm req+eq) passes.
